name: Vegetable Soup with Pesto Swirl
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb green beans, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a nonstick saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the diced carrots, celery, and leeks to the pan. Cook, stirring occasionally, until very soft, about 8 to 10 minutes. If the vegetables start to stick, add up to 1/4 cup water as needed.
3. Stir in the chicken broth and diced potatoes. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and let it cook until the potatoes are nearly tender, approximately 10 minutes.
4. Add the green beans, chopped tomato, yellow squash, zucchini, and salt to the pot. Continue cooking over low heat until all vegetables are tender, around 10 minutes.
5. Serve the soup in individual bowls. Drizzle each serving with about 1 tablespoon of pesto for garnish.
